stemHtml: Which of the following is an important factor in the formation of clear ice?

options.a: Water droplets have to be small to open the possibility to form a clear layer of ice as they freeze directly on impact.
options.b: Rapid freezing of small droplets is necessary to result in a broad coverage over the wing.
options.c: The latent heat released on freezing allows the supercooled large water droplets to flow back.
options.d: The temperature rise due to the impact of water droplets has to be significant in order to delay freezing on the wing edge.
